category_sources: Official mdzk docs describe vaults, notes, internal links, and Markdown files.
source_facts.description says it is a plain text Zettelkasten based on mdBook.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official mdzk site and /docs is the dedicated documentation path.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/mdzk-rs/mdzk, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official mdzk docs describe Markdown notes, vaults, and internal links.
